creative_proposition: Donor films infect the anchor timeline in ordered, non-reverting phases.
candidate_generation: Partition selected anchor windows into deterministic donor-film phases; every donor contributes and phase order never reverses. Every candidate retains its source film ID and media hash.
selection_rules: Donor films infect the anchor timeline in ordered, non-reverting phases.
Selection is deterministic for identical films, parameters, and random seed.
transformation_behavior: Partition selected anchor windows into deterministic donor-film phases; every donor contributes and phase order never reverses.
progression: The schedule emits film, phase, layer, or normalized-time evidence for every placement.
controlled_uncertainty: All film ordering, candidate ranking, and tie breaking are deterministic; the recipe records the seed.

hard_invariants.statement: Donor-film infection phases never move backward.
Every selected donor film contributes dialogue.
Every placement remains on the anchor timeline.

validation.strategy: Validate cinematic-law invariants, per-film provenance, measurable coverage, silence ratio, and the final audio stream.

failure_behavior: Fail before rendering when film count, analysis, contributing-film evidence, candidates, or cinematic-law invariants are unavailable.
preview_strategy: Full-length execution is supported in this phase; preview remains unavailable until multi-film reel selection preserves all law invariants.
renderer_requirements: Preserve Film A picture and chronology.
Render every replacement from its declared source film cache.
Produce a final MP4 with verified audio, coverage, silence, and multi-film provenance.

procedure_behavior.commitment: When a Procedure runtime exists, consume the complete world model and prior mappings without losing immutable per-film provenance.

quality_requirements: Output provenance names every contributing film
